name: Aristocrats
description: The Aristocrats originated as the Black Saints, a street corner greaser gang based at Seminary and Barry in Chicago that had existed since the 1950s. They changed their name around 1965 due to confusion about being a Black club. They were a multiethnic gang, mostly white but including Puerto Ricans, Mexicans, Irish, and Italians, and were active in turf conflicts throughout the 1960s and 1970s.
